raises.purpose: Fund capex - fittings plant entry + seamless/welded capacity expansion (total capex program ~INR175-200cr)
raises.source: Venus Pipes postal ballot notice Feb 2024; investor release 7 Oct 2025 confirming final tranche conversion
raises.note: Allotted to Promoter Group & Non-Promoter Group entities; final tranche received 7 Oct 2025 - fully converted, no lapse; promoters/directors contributed up to ~INR51cr of the total
raises.investors: Arun Axaykumar Kothari (Chairman & MD), Megharam S Choudhary (Whole-Time Director), Jayantiram Motiram Choudhary (Whole-Time Director), Dhruv Mahendrakumar Patel (Whole-Time Director) — all named promoter-directors; specific non-promoter co-allottee names not found in sources searched
